calendar.matters:
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR CHANGE OF NAME
Off Calendar Dec-16-2010 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for OSC hearing for Change of Name of a Minor.
Dept. 218, Commissioner: Everett A. Hewlett, Jr., Clerk: Kevin Dougherty, CSR: Helen Sorep-Matley, 225.

Petitioner Mairead McGarry was present in pro per as Guardian ad Litem for minor Brendan Michael Molloy.
Proof of Publication in the file.

No objections to the proposed change of name were made at the hearing.
It appears to the satisfaction of the Court that all the allegations in the petition are true, correct and sufficient, and that the petition should be granted.

The Court grants the petition for Change of Name of the Minor to Brendan Michael McCarry.

Decree Changing Name was submitted to and signed by the Court.

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR CHANGE OF NAME
Off Calendar Dec-09-2010 Reset To Dec-16-10 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 218 For Order To Show Cause
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for OSC hearing for Change of Name of a Minor.
Dept. 218, Commissioner: Everett A. Hewlett, Jr., Clerk: Kevin Dougherty, CSR: Arlene Howell, CSR #2542.

PetitionerMairead McGarry was present in pro per as Guardian ad Litem for the minor, Brendan Michael Molloy.
Petitioner was placed under oath and examined.

The Proof of Publication reads that the proposed name change was published three consecutive weeks and not four consecutive weeks as required.

Good cause appearing, this matter is CONTINUED to December 16, 2010 @ 9:00 a.m. for hearing on the Order to Show Cause for Change of Name of a Minor. Petitioner shall obtain an amended Proof of Publication prior to the next calling of the case.
